title: rubus gallofuscus
intro: Rubus gallofuscus, also known as the Gallic Raspberry or French Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a perennial shrub native to Europe, known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. Rubus gallofuscus has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation, due to its antiseptic and astringent properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce fever.
